description_long: This object is a square chessboard with a classic 8x8 grid of alternating black and white squares, set within a wide, beveled border that appears to be made of polished marble. The playing surface is flat and smooth, with each square sharply defined and evenly spaced. The border is light gray with subtle veining, characteristic of marble, and is slightly raised above the playing surface, providing a sturdy frame. The chessboard is relatively thin in height, giving it a sleek, modern appearance suitable for outdoor or public park settings. There are no visible decorative elements or inscriptions on the border, and the board is empty, with no chess pieces present. The overall design is elegant and functional, emphasizing durability and visual clarity.
description: A marble-framed chessboard with a classic 8x8 grid of alternating black and white squares, featuring a smooth, polished surface and a wide, beveled border.
description_view_0: Front view of the chessboard showing the full 8x8 grid and the wide, marble border with subtle veining.
description_view_1: Rear view of the chessboard, visually identical to the front, displaying the grid and marble border.
description_view_2: Side view of the chessboard, highlighting the thin profile and the continuous marble border.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the previous side, with the same thin profile and marble border.
attribute_board_pattern: The playing surface features a regular grid of 64 squares arranged in an 8x8 pattern, with alternating black and white squares. The squares are perfectly aligned and evenly sized, creating a classic checkerboard appearance. The border is wide, beveled, and made of light gray marble with subtle veining, providing a clean and elegant frame around the grid.
attribute_border_design: The border is wide, beveled, and constructed from light gray marble with natural veining. It is smooth and polished, with no visible ornamentation, inscriptions, or additional markings. The border is slightly raised above the playing surface, providing a sturdy and elegant frame.
